description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The exterior features a combination of light pinkish brick and white surfaces, with large windows providing ample natural light. The property includes a circular driveway with multiple parked cars, a green lawn, and a fenced perimeter. At the rear, there is a sizable swimming pool with lounge chairs and a shaded patio area. The house has multiple stories, with rooftop terraces and a mix of private and communal outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a circular driveway, and a backyard pool, featuring pink brick and white surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, garage doors, and green lawn with parked cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the transition to the backyard with the pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large swimming pool, lounge area, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, cars, and the full extent of the backyard and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, minimal steps, and a clean, open approach with no porch or columns, emphasizing simplicity and accessibility.
